overrides.C0684:
<?php
// C0684 · REST CRUD JSON (demo in-memory)
namespace App\Controller;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\JsonResponse;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

final class ItemsController {
  private static array $items = [];
  private static int $seq = 1;

  #[Route('/api/items', methods: ['GET'])]
  public function list(): JsonResponse {
    return new JsonResponse(array_values(self::$items));
  }

  #[Route('/api/items', methods: ['POST'])]
  public function create(Request $r): JsonResponse {
    $data = json_decode($r->getContent(), true) ?? [];
    $it = ['id' => self::$seq++, 'name' => (string)($data['name'] ?? '')];
    self::$items[$it['id']] = $it;
    return new JsonResponse($it, 201);
  }
}
overrides.C0685:
<?php
// C0685 · Middleware logging + timing (EventSubscriber)
namespace App\EventSubscriber;
use Symfony\Component\EventDispatcher\EventSubscriberInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event\RequestEvent;
use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event\ResponseEvent;
use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\KernelEvents;

final class TimingSubscriber implements EventSubscriberInterface {
  public static function getSubscribedEvents(): array {
    return [KernelEvents::REQUEST => 'onReq', KernelEvents::RESPONSE => 'onRes'];
  }
  public function onReq(RequestEvent $e): void { $e->getRequest()->attributes->set('_t0', microtime(true)); }
  public function onRes(ResponseEvent $e): void {
    $t0 = $e->getRequest()->attributes->get('_t0', microtime(true));
    $ms = (microtime(true) - $t0) * 1000;
    error_log($e->getRequest()->getMethod().' '.$e->getRequest()->getPathInfo().' '.round($ms).'ms');
  }
}
